description: §60.9 — an `<api>` body line that is not blank, not a comment, and conforms to none of the §60.2 endpoint grammar (stray prose, no `->` arrow) fires the catch-all E-API-ENDPOINT-MALFORMED (parse-time, W2). This is the catch-all the W2 parser needs alongside the precise response/method/base codes.
rationale: §60.9: a body line matching none of the more-specific shapes (not blank, not a comment, not conforming to the §60.2 endpoint grammar) is E-API-ENDPOINT-MALFORMED. `this is not a valid endpoint declaration` has no `->` arrow, so it is malformed-as-endpoint.
